nasb.text: Thus says the Lord, “For three transgressions of Moab and for four I will not revoke its punishment, Because he burned the bones of the king of Edom to lime.

esv.text: Thus says the Lord: “For three transgressions of Moab, and for four, I will not revoke the punishment, because he burned to lime the bones of the king of Edom.

cnv.text: “耶和華這樣說： ‘摩押三番四次犯罪， 我必不收回懲罰他的命令； 因為他把以東王的骸骨焚燒成灰。

ccb.text: 耶和华说： “摩押人三番四次地犯罪， 我必不收回对他们的惩罚， 因为他们把以东王的骸骨焚烧成灰。
